Snapshot — May 22, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,497.84   z +1.69
  10Y Yield:      4.536%  z +1.49
  WTI Oil:        96.71   z +0.23

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,498 is pushing above its recent range — a move that only matters if it holds. 10Y yield at 4.54% is elevated relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. Oil at $97 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from oil.

INVALIDATION
• SPX breaks above 7,610 or below 7,385
• 10Y moves beyond 4.74% or below 4.34%

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.
